{{CargoRelic
|name=Clone Analysis Report
|class_id=20827
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Stored within this uniquely designed terminal are research data recorded by the Microcosm civilization. It contains detailed information about various clones and precise experimental procedures, making it a treasury of cloning technology.
|fame=14
|art=13
|fth=11
|civ=16
|tech=33
|ss1=Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail HP +20<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail RUSH +2<br>Files fully restored: 100/100
|ss2=Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail HP +40<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail RUSH +4<br>Files fully restored: 100/100
|ss3=Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail HP +60<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail RUSH +6<br>Files fully restored: 100/100
|ss4=Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail HP +60<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail RUSH +6<br>Files fully restored: 100/100
|ss7=Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail HP +60<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail RUSH +6<br>Files fully restored: 100/100<br> (Awakened)
}}
